Problem Statement: True or False . In the following exercises, justify your answer with a proof or a counterexample.

Problem Statement: True or False . In the following exercises, justify your answer with a proof or a counterexample.
Question: You can use the quotient rule to evaluate $$\underset{x \rightarrow 0}{\text{lim}} \frac{\text{sin} x}{x} .$$

Problem Statement: True or False . In the following exercises, justify your answer with a proof or a counterexample.

Problem Statement: True or False . In the following exercises, justify your answer with a proof or a counterexample.
Question: If $$\underset{x \rightarrow a}{\text{lim}} f \left(\right. x \left.\right)$$ does not exist, then f is undefined at the point $$x = a .$$
Answer: False. A removable discontinuity is possible.

Problem Statement: In the following exercises, use the squeeze theorem to prove the limit.
Question: $$\underset{x \rightarrow 0}{\text{lim}} x^{2} \text{cos} \left(\right. 2 \pi x \left.\right) = 0$$
Answer: Since $$-1 \le \text{cos} ( 2 \pi x ) \le 1 ,$$ then $$- x^{2} \le x^{2} \text{cos} ( 2 \pi x ) \le x^{2} .$$ Since $$\underset{x \rightarrow 0}{\text{lim}} x^{2} = 0 = \underset{x \rightarrow 0}{\text{lim}} - x^{2} ,$$ it follows that $$\underset{x \rightarrow 0}{\text{lim}} x^{2} \text{cos} \left(\right. 2 \pi x \left.\right) = 0 .$$

Question: Determine the domain such that the function $$f ( x ) = \sqrt{x - 2} + x e^{x}$$ is continuous over its domain.

Problem Statement: In the following exercises, use the precise definition of limit to prove the limit.
